title: Heartbeat: Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) — Gate 1 standing-by post-resume
body: active; Director resumed 12:36:08Z absorbing owner quota signal (6-Opus exceeds budget); Gate 1 awaiting CI verdict on pushed 795d2e9d; no Director routing to me; standing by; observing owner-quota signal applies to my Opus seat
